topPlaces.description: Chandwad (IPA:Cāndavaḍa) is a town located in Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. It is 250 km from Mumbai.

items.note: Chandwad (IPA:Cāndavaḍa) is a town located in Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. It is 250 km from Mumbai.
Rajdeher Fort is a fort located 10 km (6.2 mi) from chandwad, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Nashik district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandwad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandwad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandwad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandwad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandwad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandwad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Chandwad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandwad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandwad, Rajdher fort.
